features.name: Expose POST /api/ai/generate endpoint for AI DM generation
Add GET /api/conversations/unread endpoint and instagram_get_unread MCP tool
features.note: Detects unread badges, returns count + conversation list

features.name: Add message timestamp extraction to readMessages()
features.note: Extracts timestamp from <time> elements and timestamp classes

features.name: Add rate-limit UI detection (Action Blocked banner) before sends
features.note: detectRateLimitBanner() checks for action blocked messages, added to sendMessage()

features.name: Add POST /api/requests/:username/accept and /decline with MCP tools
Add conversation scroll pagination to GET /api/conversations
Add optional Supabase CRM logging for DM sends
features.note: Fire-and-forget logging to crm_messages table via SUPABASE_URL/SUPABASE_ANON_KEY env vars

features.name: Add GET /api/profile/:username endpoint and instagram_get_profile MCP tool
features.note: Uses existing enrichContact() to extract profile info
